top_signals.title: IFM Investors Nears 50% Stake in Atlas Arteria as Deadline Looms
top_signals.summary: IFM Investors is nearing a 50% holding in Australia-listed toll road operator Atlas Arteria Ltd., ahead of the Thursday night deadline on its takeover bid.

top_signals.title: North Korea’s Kim says country will exercise its position as nuclear state
top_signals.summary: The leader says his position is the only way to cope with an unpredictable and complicated global security situation.

top_signals.title: SpaceX falls for third day, erasing $600 billion in market value
top_signals.summary: The Elon Musk-led company's market capitalization now sits just above $2 trillion after shares fell 16% to close at $154.60 on Monday.
